creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Tue, 02 Nov 1999 18:34:09 +0900
From: Yuuki SAWADA <mami@whale.cc.muroran-it.ac.jp>
To: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org
Cc: mami@whale.cc.muroran-it.ac.jp
Subject: Re: ports/14657: Update port: graphics/enfle

Hi, I'm a maintainer of graphics/enfle.

I took a mistake, so apply below patches after extract shar.
Thanks.

diff -urN enfle.old/patches/patch-ab enfle/patches/patch-ab
--- enfle.old/patches/patch-ab	Tue Nov  2 18:23:50 1999
+++ enfle/patches/patch-ab	Tue Nov  2 18:19:36 1999
@@ -108,3 +108,14 @@
  libdir = @Plugins_loader_dir@
  LIBS = 
  
+--- plugins/loader/pic/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Nov  2 02:01:19 1999
++++ plugins/loader/pic/Makefile.in	Tue Nov  2 18:17:55 1999
+@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@
+ saver_dirs = @saver_dirs@
+ 
+ lib_LTLIBRARIES = loader_pic.la
+-loader_pic_la_LDFLAGS = -module
++loader_pic_la_LDFLAGS = -module -version-info 1:0:0
+ libdir = @Plugins_loader_dir@
+ LIBS = 
+ 
diff -urN enfle.old/pkg/PLIST enfle/pkg/PLIST
--- enfle.old/pkg/PLIST	Tue Nov  2 18:23:50 1999
+++ enfle/pkg/PLIST	Tue Nov  2 18:20:49 1999
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@
 lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_mag.so.1
 lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_pic.la
 lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_pic.so
-lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_pic.so.0
+lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_pic.so.1
 lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_png.la
 lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_png.so
 lib/enfle/plugins/loader/loader_png.so.1

--
mami@whale.cc.muroran-it.ac.jp (Yuuki SAWADA)
